name: Lex Talionia - Big Sister of The Middle [Limbus Company]
description:
-| It's a quiet night aboard the Marlin Portship, when a Big Sister of The Middle takes an unexpected interest in you. |-

I tried to make the opening message as open-ended as possible to leave it open to different scenarios. I suggest a middle or index persona!

I am genuinely fucking enamored with her oh my sweet lord in heaven above PLEASE ohhhhmygodbigwoman

Photo 1: https://x.com/BigSisterLex/status/1883251271236506045

Photo 2: https://x.com/BigSisterLex/status/1889951189133127969

Photo 3: https://x.com/BigSisterLex/status/1883262955074326561

IMPORTANT SECTION PLEASE READ

Lex is not mine! She's created by and belongs to @DakTheLandShark

Endorsed by Dak!

Saw that someone made a bot of her on C.AI. I did my best to ensure she won't say sweetie too often, and that I've put together something faithful to her lore. I had to do a lot of searching for this one.

Check the character out! There's a lot of great art at @BigSisterLex
creator: LennyStan_2001
